entities.name: SkillExecutionContext
entities.definition: Runtime context object carrying skill invocation parameters, user identity, and environmental configuration during a skill pipeline execution.

entities.name: PipelineStageResult
entities.definition: Immutable value object recording the output, status, and duration of a single pipeline stage during skill execution.

vocabulary_terms.definition: Runtime environment and parameter bundle for a single skill invocation
Recorded outcome of one discrete stage within a skill execution pipeline
